_note: Complete hotfix context: fix is implemented and committed, ready to produce the PR title and body (step 8 only). Uses the same bug as eval 1 (issue #88).

bug.title: Bug: Settlement amount rounds incorrectly for amounts above 10,000
bug.body: Merchants receiving settlement payouts for amounts above £10,000 are consistently underpaid by £0.01 due to floating-point truncation in `calculateSettlementAmount()`.

fix_context.description: use integer arithmetic for settlement amount calculation to avoid floating-point truncation
fix_context.root_cause: calculateSettlementAmount() used JavaScript floating-point division which truncates amounts above 10,000 by £0.01
fix_context.what_changed: replaced floating-point division with integer arithmetic in src/services/settlement.ts:calculateSettlementAmount()
fix_context.risk: all settlement amount calculations — existing tests cover amounts below 10,000; new test covers the boundary case
